expectations.text: Identifies datediff() missing the required third argument (unit) as a syntax error
expectations.evidence: Clearly identified datediff() only has 2 arguments, requires 3. Listed as Syntax Error.

expectations.text: Provides a corrected datediff() call with a unit argument (e.g., 'd')
Notes that '' as the false branch of if() in a calc field will produce blank, not an error
expectations.evidence: Explicitly stated 'The if() wrapper returns an empty string when enroll_date is blank, which is correct.'

expectations.text: Does NOT incorrectly flag [enroll_date] or [fu_date] as reference errors (both exist in the field list)
expectations.evidence: Did not flag these as reference errors. Appropriately noted fu_date name suggests it might logically belong to followup event, and asked user to verify — without asserting it IS on the wrong event.
